steps.title: Update package.json name and scripts
commands: cd /home/gaganverma/ai-dev-system/output && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));p.name='salon-booking-saas';p.version='1.0.0';p.description='Production-grade UAE Salon Booking SaaS Backend';p.scripts={start:'node server.js',dev:'node --watch server.js',healthcheck:'node scripts/healthCheck.js'};fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));console.log('Done');"

steps.title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
commands:
cat > /home/gaganverma/ai-dev-system/output/.github/workflows/ci.yml << 'EOF'
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: ['**']
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7.0
        ports: [27017:27017]
        options: --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand(\"ping\")' " --health-interval 10s --health-timeout 5s --health-retries 5
      redis:
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports: [6379:6379]
        options: --health-cmd "redis-cli ping" --health-interval 10s --health-timeout 5s --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js 20
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Syntax check all source files
        run: |
          for f in app.js server.js models/*.js routes/*.js middleware/*.js utils/*.js cron/*.js; do
            node --check "$f" && echo "OK: $f"
          done

      - name: Health check — server starts
        env:
          PORT: 3001
          NODE_ENV: test
          MONGO_URI: mongodb://localhost:27017/salon_ci
          REDIS_URL: redis://localhost:6379/1
          JWT_SECRET: ci_test_jwt_secret_exactly_32_chars_x
          JWT_EXPIRES_IN: 1h
          VAT_RATE: '0.05'
          TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID: ACtest
          TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN: testtoken
          TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM: whatsapp:+14155238886
          STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: sk_test_PLACEHOLDER
          METRICS_TOKEN: ci_token
        run: |
          node server.js &
          sleep 8
          curl --fail http://localhost:3001/health
          echo "Health check passed"
EOF

steps.title: Create GitHub Actions Deploy workflow
commands:
cat > /home/gaganverma/ai-dev-system/output/.github/workflows/deploy.yml << 'EOF'
name: Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js 20
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --only=production

      - name: Deploy via SSH
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.3
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.SERVER_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.SERVER_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.SERVER_SSH_KEY }}
          port: ${{ secrets.SERVER_PORT }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/salon-booking-saas
            git pull origin main
            npm ci --only=production
            pm2 restart salon-api --update-env
            pm2 save
            echo "Deployed at $(date)"

      - name: Notify Slack on success
        if: success()
        run: |
          curl -X POST ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }} \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            -d '{"text":"Salon API deployed to production successfully. Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"}'

      - name: Notify Slack on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          curl -X POST ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }} \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            -d '{"text":"FAILED: Salon API deployment failed. Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"}'
EOF

steps.title: Create new GitHub repo using gh CLI
commands: gh repo create taaqib-masood/salon-booking-saas --public --description 'Production-grade UAE Salon Booking SaaS Backend — Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Multi-tenant, WhatsApp, Stripe, POS' --homepage 'https://github.com/taaqib-masood/salon-booking-saas'

steps.title: Update git remote to new repo
Stage all files and commit
commands: cd /home/gaganverma/ai-dev-system/output && git add .github/ package.json .gitignore cron/ locales/ middleware/tenant.js models/Tenant.js models/TenantSubscription.js models/PosTerminal.js routes/tenants.js routes/subscriptions.js routes/pos.js utils/i18n.js utils/tenantFilter.js utils/receipt.js utils/pos.js frontend/

cd /home/gaganverma/ai-dev-system/output && git commit -m 'feat: Phase 1+2 complete — UAE Salon Booking SaaS Backend

Phase 1 — Core:
- 9 Mongoose models with UAE VAT 5%, AED currency, EN/AR bilingual fields
- 14 Express routes: auth, branches, staff, services, appointments, customers
- JWT auth with role-based access (admin/manager/receptionist/stylist)
- Loyalty points, cancellation policy, real-time slot availability
- Stripe payments + Twilio WhatsApp notifications

Phase 2 — SaaS:
- Multi-tenant architecture with X-Tenant-ID header routing
- Cron jobs: reminders, no-show, loyalty expiry, offer expiry
- Square POS terminal integration with receipt generation
- Arabic i18n (EN/AR) with Intl.DateTimeFormat for UAE locale
- React frontend scaffold with Vite + Tailwind + RTL support

CI/CD:
- GitHub Actions CI: syntax check + health check on every push
- GitHub Actions Deploy: SSH deploy to production on main branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>'

steps.title: Set develop as default branch for PRs + add GitHub Secrets instructions
commands: gh api repos/taaqib-masood/salon-booking-saas/branches/main/protection --method PUT --field required_status_checks='{"strict":true,"contexts":["lint-and-test"]}' --field enforce_admins=false --field required_pull_request_reviews=null --field restrictions=null
echo 'Required secrets: SERVER_HOST, SERVER_USER, SERVER_SSH_KEY, SERVER_PORT, SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL'
